claim.content: The DMC-calculated quasiparticle effective mass exhibits opposite trends with density for the two spin polarizations studied: in the paramagnetic (unpolarized) 2D HEG $m^{*}$ increases with increasing $r_{s}$ (decreasing density), producing a significant enhancement at $r_{s}=5$ and $r_{s}=10$, whereas in the fully ferromagnetic (fully spin-polarized) 2D HEG $m^{*}$ decreases as density is lowered; these calculated trends are quantitatively consistent with the experimental observations of Tan et al. for paramagnetic systems and of Padmanabhan et al. for ferromagnetic or partially spin-polarized systems.
